contracts.guarantee: every cross-runtime message is signed with origin runtime id, schema version, and provenance manifest
context vectors exchanged read-only; receiver never mutates supplied context
escalation tier is monotonic across runtime boundaries; receiver may raise but never lower
chain-records cross runtime boundaries verbatim; receiver may extend, never edit
delegated orchestration step preserves the source runtime's supervision state; supervised stays supervised
only declared cognition surfaces are shared; private cognition state stays inside its runtime
contracts.violation: private cognition state leaks across runtime boundary

contracts.guarantee: continuity records cross runtime boundaries append-only; non-inheritable signals are filtered out
contracts.violation: non-inheritable signal (e.g. destructive-confirmation) crosses a runtime boundary

contracts.guarantee: visual references cross runtime boundaries read-only; visual-risk freeze contract is honored
publication requests honor lifecycle P-tier gates; un-promoted content is rejected
contracts.violation: publication-runtime accepts content above its P-tier

contracts.guarantee: all federated runtimes pin a compatible schema version; mismatch is a federation error

rules: Contracts are declared; runtimes cannot invent new contracts at runtime.
Contract violations are federation errors, not warnings.
Contracts are versioned; receivers verify schema compatibility before acceptance.
Contracts cannot elevate confidence, promote P-tier, or reassign role across boundaries.
